title: Silent Orbit
overview: A maintenance crew uncovers a mystery aboard a quiet space station near Europa.

title: Harbor Lights
overview: A former sailor returns home to rebuild a family diner on the Baltic coast.

title: The Last Compiler
overview: A programmer races to recover a lost build system before a citywide outage.

title: Gardens of Mars
overview: Botanists attempt to grow the first open-air garden inside a Martian dome.

title: Winter Signal
overview: Radio operators track a strange signal crossing the polar night sky.

title: Metro Sunrise
overview: Commuters trapped underground discover how much their lives overlap.

title: Fast Vector
overview: A racing team designs an experimental electric car for a mountain circuit.

title: Archive of Rain
overview: A historian follows weather diaries that reveal a hidden wartime route.

title: Small Gods of Hardware
overview: Repair shop friends save vintage computers while their neighborhood changes.

title: Deep Field
overview: Astronomers find evidence of an impossible object in deep space images.

title: The Courtyard Chef
overview: A chef builds a community kitchen after losing a prestigious restaurant job.

title: Glass River
overview: Two detectives investigate a robbery along a frozen river crossing.
